title: RCCE Social Investigation Form - Part A: County/Subcounty Interface

extension.valueString: %resource.descendants().where(linkId='819943434_national' or linkId='819943434_county' or linkId='819943434_sub_county' or linkId='819943434').answer.value.display

item.text: Do you have RCCE Focal point at this level?
Do you have a functional RCCE sub-committee?
Who are the members of the RCCE subcommittee team?
Please share or verify minutes of the last RCCE coordination meeting?
Do you have a RCCE contingency plan for ongoing outbreak?
What RCCE activities have you implemented?
Do we have a way of doing community social listening?
If yes, list ways of community social listening
Do you have a functional hotline?
List Key RCCE achievements realized during the ongoing outbreak response
List the current partners supporting RCCE activities at this level
What are the RCCE related challenges which have been experienced during the current outbreak response?
